description: JCS (RFC 8785) profile for decision evidence (decision_id) preimage — execution-join-ref-v1
name: jcs-rfc8785-v1

numeric_domain.note: RFC 8785 Sec 3.2.2.3 requires ECMA-262 Number-to-String canonicalization; only integers exactly representable as an IEEE-754 double (|n| <= 2^53-1) are in this profile's domain. ts_ms is a non-negative Unix millisecond timestamp, so the lower bound is 0. Fractional values, exponential notation, and integers outside this range are out of domain -- the verifier MUST return OUT_OF_PROFILE_DOMAIN, never attempt best-effort canonicalization or fall back to a different library's number handling.

superseded_reason: Original profile doc left duplicate_keys and numeric_domain unpinned. Additive tightening only -- no previously-valid canonicalization changes; only previously-ambiguous inputs (duplicate preimage keys, numbers outside the RFC 8785 safe-integer domain) now REJECT explicitly instead of falling to implementation-defined behavior. Old doc remains resolvable for evidence that already names it.
